text.title: Vendor Evaluation Framework Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Vendor Evaluation Framework output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

forbidden.pattern: annual revisit missing OR skipped >18 months

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: candidates populated with a typed value
rubric populated with a typed value
trial_plan populated with a typed value
rollback_gate populated with a typed value
annual_revisit_date populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
